data.title: OKX will delist XR, GOAL, KP3R, LBR, LAMB, BZZ and GPT spot trading pairs
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, in order to maintain a healthy spot trading environment, OKX will delist multiple trading pairs that do not meet the listing standards. The affected trading pairs include XR/USDT, GOAL/USDT, GOAL/USDC, KP3R/USDT, KP3R/USDC, LBR/USDT, LAMB/USDT, LAMB/USDC, BZZ/USDT, BZZ/USDC and GPT/USDT.
OKX will delist the above trading pairs from 16:00-17:00 Beijing time on March 20, 2025. The platform recommends that users cancel the relevant orders before delisting, otherwise the system will automatically cancel these orders, and the cancellation process may take 1-3 working days.

data.title: Analysis: USDT on-chain activity hits 6-month high, traders may be ready to buy the dip
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the blockchain data platform Santiment, Tether (USDT) on-chain activity reached a 6-month high, with more than 143,000 wallets transferring on March 11. Analysts believe this may indicate that traders are preparing for a market rebound. Vincent Liu, chief investment officer of Kronos Research, pointed out that traders usually accumulate USDT when the market falls to look for buying opportunities, thereby increasing buying pressure and driving prices back up. In addition, the inflation rate fell to 2.8% in February, which may create a more favorable environment for the cryptocurrency market. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Tether's On-Chain Activity Reaches Six-Month High, Indicating Potential Market Rebound
data.description: According to Odaily, blockchain data platform Santiment reports that Tether (USDT) on-chain activity has reached a six-month high, with over 143,000 wallets conducting transfers on March 11. Analysts suggest this surge may indicate that traders are preparing for a market rebound. Vincent Liu, Chief Investment Officer at Kronos Research, noted that traders often accumulate USDT during market downturns to seek buying opportunities, thereby increasing buying pressure and potentially driving prices up. Additionally, the inflation rate dropped to 2.8% in February, which could create a more favorable environment for the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Uniswap stablecoin exchange suffered a "sandwich attack", and crypto traders lost more than $215,000 in 8 seconds
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: A crypto trader suffered a "sandwich attack" when exchanging stablecoins on Uniswap V3, and was preempted by the MEV (Miner Extractable Value) robot, resulting in a loss of more than $215,000. 
Specifically, in just eight seconds, $220,764 worth of $USDC was exchanged for only $5,271 worth of $USDT because the MEV robot successfully jumped the queue and executed the operation before the transaction. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Alibaba Unveils AI Model To Compete With OpenAI
data.description: According to PANews, Alibaba Group has launched a new artificial intelligence model named R1-Omni, designed to read human emotions, and made it available for free download. This move is aimed at competing with OpenAI's GPT-4.5, which can identify emotional cues in text but comes with a high monthly fee of $200. Developed by Tongyi Lab, R1-Omni can analyze videos to infer emotional states, describe clothing, and assess the surrounding environment, thereby enhancing computer vision capabilities. The model is an upgraded version of the previously open-source HumanOmni model.

data.title: U.S. Senator Lummis' new Bitcoin bill requires a stricter purchase plan and uses gold revaluation proceeds to buy Bitcoin
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Bitcoin Laws, U.S. Senator Cynthia Lummis has resubmitted the Bitcoin Act to the Senate, and the previous 2024 version was shelved in the committee. The new version, like the previous version, proposes to purchase 1 million bitcoins within 5 years, but there are several key differences. 
The 2025 version of the Bitcoin Act sets a stricter plan to purchase 200,000 bitcoins per year (rather than "up to" 200,000 in the 2024 version). The new version also strengthens the holding requirements and removes the exception clause for repayment of federal debt instruments in the previous version. 
The bill adds a provision to coordinate Bitcoin purchases with the Exchange Stabilization Fund (ESF), which was not mentioned in the 2024 version. The ESF is a reserve fund of the U.S. Treasury with approximately $39 billion in assets, and the executive branch's Bitcoin acquisition may use the fund. 
In terms of gold revaluation, the new version explicitly stipulates that the proceeds from the revaluation of federal reserve gold should be used to purchase Bitcoin, while the 2024 version only includes these funds in the general fund, which is a major change.

data.title: KIP Protocol releases Superior AI Agents, a self-learning AI framework
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Web3 AI underlying protocol KIP Protocol recently launched Superior AI Agents, an artificial intelligence framework with autonomous learning capabilities. Unlike traditional AI that relies on static data and manual settings, Superior Agents can evolve dynamically and learn and optimize decisions in real environments without human intervention. This framework breaks through the traditional machine learning paradigm, transforming AI from a passive tool to a self-optimizing intelligent agent. The KIP Protocol team has been conducting related research at the National University of Singapore since 2020, breaking the traditional machine learning paradigm and proving that AI can test its own theories through real-world environments, rather than relying solely on human data memory.

data.title: Crypto market sectors generally rose, with the Layer2 sector leading the way with a 3.72% increase
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On March 13, according to SoSoValue data, the crypto market sectors generally continued their upward trend, with the Layer2 sector leading the way with a 3.72% increase. Within the sector, Mantle (MNT) rose 4.86% in 24 hours, and Celestia (TIA) rose 12.06%. The ssiLayer2 index, which reflects the historical market conditions of the sector, rose 3.84%, but the weekly return rate was still -4.89%.
In addition, Bitcoin (BTC) rose 1.55%, but Ethereum (ETH) fell again by 0.13%, falling below $1,900.
In other sectors, the AI ​​sector rose 3.65% in 24 hours, of which KAITO rose 11.29%; the Meme sector rose 3.55%, and within the sector, Pepe (PEPE) rose 10.63%; the Layer1 sector rose 2.70%, the PayFi sector rose 1.63%, and the DeFi sector rose 0.72%.
It is worth mentioning that the ssiGameFi and ssiMeme indices, which reflect the historical market trends of the sector, rose by 4.01% and 3.61% respectively in 24 hours, but their weekly returns were -10.55% and -12.88% respectively.

data.title: Fox Business crypto journalist Eleanor Terrett announces her departure
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Fox Business crypto journalist Eleanor Terrett announced her resignation on the X platform and joined Crypto In America, a weekly podcast and newsletter program for the Sei ecosystem. Eleanor Terrett also revealed that she will launch her own extended content business later this year. It is reported that CZ congratulated Eleanor Terrett. (Note: Crypto In America's X account is currently frozen, the specific reason is not clear, and the community is reminded to interact with caution)

data.title: Argentine lawyer applies for international arrest warrant to hunt down Hayden Davis, central figure in Libra scandal
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Argentine lawyer Gregorio Dalbon has formally applied to Interpol for a red warrant for the arrest of entrepreneur Hayden Davis related to the Libra cryptocurrency scandal. Dalbon accused Davis of playing a central role in the collapse of the Libra token, causing investors to lose millions of dollars. The Libra scandal has previously sparked controversy with Argentine President Javier Milei because he publicly promoted the token on the X platform before the token collapsed and then deleted the tweet. At present, prosecutors have frozen about $100 million in crypto assets related to the case, and Davis' lawyer has not yet responded to the matter. (Decrypt)
